name: Fundamentals of Generative AI
description: Core concepts of AI and generative AI, machine learning lifecycle, foundation models, multimodal architectures, responsible AI principles, and evaluation metrics.

subtopics.name: AI vs Generative AI
subtopics.description: Definitions, evolution, and business impact of AI and generative AI.

subtopics.name: Machine Learning Fundamentals
subtopics.description: ML lifecycle, data types, model training, and evaluation.

subtopics.name: Foundation Models & Architectures
subtopics.description: Large language models, diffusion models, transformers, embeddings, and vector representations.

subtopics.name: Gen AI Use Cases
subtopics.description: Content creation, summarization, code generation, chatbots, image/video generation, and automation.

subtopics.name: Responsible AI Principles
subtopics.description: Fairness, bias, interpretability, explainability, safety, and privacy in AI systems.

subtopics.name: Evaluation Metrics
subtopics.description: BLEU, ROUGE, FID, perplexity, hallucination rates, and human-centered evaluation methods.

name: Google Cloud Gen AI Products & Strategy
description: Google Cloud's generative AI ecosystem including Gemini, Vertex AI, Model Garden, Generative AI Studio, Workspace integrations, AI governance, and compliance frameworks.

subtopics.name: Gemini Models
subtopics.description: Gemini Ultra, Pro, Flash, and Nano — capabilities, multimodal features, and use cases.

subtopics.name: Vertex AI Platform
subtopics.description: Unified ML platform for building, deploying, and managing AI models at scale.

subtopics.name: Model Garden & Generative AI Studio
subtopics.description: Discovering, customizing, and deploying foundation models; prompt design and testing.

subtopics.name: Google Workspace AI Features
subtopics.description: Duet AI / Gemini for Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, and Meet integrations.

subtopics.name: Google Cloud AI Governance
subtopics.description: SAIF, Data Loss Prevention, IAM, CMEK encryption, model monitoring, and compliance.

subtopics.name: Agentspace & AI Agents
subtopics.description: Conversational agents, Dialogflow CX, Agent Builder, and multi-agent orchestration.

name: Techniques to Improve Gen AI Model Output
description: Prompt engineering, grounding, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), fine-tuning, bias mitigation, and model evaluation strategies.

subtopics.name: Prompt Engineering
subtopics.description: Zero-shot, few-shot, chain-of-thought, role prompting, and multi-turn optimization techniques.

subtopics.name: Grounding & RAG
subtopics.description: Retrieval-augmented generation for factuality, relevance, and hallucination mitigation.

subtopics.name: Fine-Tuning & Adaptation
subtopics.description: Supervised fine-tuning, LoRA, PEFT, and reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF).

subtopics.name: Bias Detection & Mitigation
subtopics.description: Identifying, measuring, and reducing bias in generative AI models and outputs.

name: Business Strategies for Successful AI Adoption
description: Organizational AI strategy, change management, ROI measurement, risk management, responsible deployment, and identifying AI opportunities across industries.

subtopics.name: AI Strategy & Transformation
subtopics.description: Building an AI-first culture, change management, and organizational readiness.

subtopics.name: AI Project Implementation
subtopics.description: Project lifecycle, stakeholder management, data strategy, and success measurement.

subtopics.name: Risk, Ethics & Responsible AI
subtopics.description: Risk assessment, fairness, privacy, transparency, and responsible deployment practices.

subtopics.name: Industry Use Cases & Opportunities
subtopics.description: Gen AI opportunities across healthcare, finance, retail, manufacturing, and other sectors.
